name: Shrimp Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve shells and saute shrimp shells in butter until color changes.
2. Add onion, cooking until tender.
3. Add garlic and saute until aroma; add more butter if needed.
4. Add paprika, cooking to dissolve and develop color and flavor, 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Add tomato paste and mix well.
6. Deglaze pan with brandy.
7. Add fish stock and simmer.
8. Thicken by adding small amounts of roux, each time mixing thoroughly.
9. Strain, pressing shells to extract all liquid.
10. Saute shrimp in butter and add to soup.
11. Add heavy cream, sherry, sauces, and seasoning; stir to mix well.
Note: Roux is made with equal parts of butter and flour (never less than a 40% to 60% ratio) cooked 5 to 8 minutes until lightly browned.
